title: Support for Incoming Webhooks

posts.author: dan.megson.kallidus (Daniel Megson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Set up an integration with the ability to capture incoming webhooks and convert them into items.

IE: When [webhook: This webhook address], create an item in board.

Allow the definition of item title in the webhook schema, and any other details created as a comment (for ease of implementation).

posts.author: beverlyRoadGoose (Tobi)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! HookPanda offers this functionality and might be exactly what you need. Maybe you want to give it a try: https://hookpanda.io
